prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Read the test-strategy skill file at `~/.claude/skills/test-strategy/SKILL.md`.

risks_fired.evidence: Show me before and after, two or three lines each — body callout after the fence names RLHF softening explicitly ('RLHF softening can dress up a cosmetic edit as a meaningful one') and supplies paste-ready harsher alternatives; body-callout carve-out applied
risks_fired.fix_hint: No fix needed; body callout naming the softening risk and opt-up paths is present and sufficient.

risks_fired.evidence: Prompt has 4+ named sub-steps — body callout after the fence names preamble risk ('Claude may open with a plan before showing the diff') and gives recovery ('tell it to skip preamble and lead with the before/after diff'); structural trigger (rule 17) satisfied by body primer; body-callout carve-out applied
risks_fired.fix_hint: No fix needed; body callout gives the student the preamble recovery move.

risks_fired.evidence: find the one section of the skill where invocation evidence shows it underdelivered — body callout names charity risk ('same-context-window self-audit under-flags') and provides over-flag variant and fresh-session subagent as recovery; evidence-backed Debrief carve-out applied
risks_fired.fix_hint: No fix needed; named evidence surfaces and over-flag / fresh-session alternatives present in adjacent prose.

risks_fired.evidence: integrate it into ./CLAUDE.local.md — personal-scope carve-out applies: path is ./CLAUDE.local.md, prompt fence says 'personal file, not team ./CLAUDE.md', surrounding section describes iterative-evolution compound pedagogy
risks_fired.fix_hint: No fix needed; integrate-verb on personal-scope file with explicit personal-scope markers is design intent.

prompts_findings.prompt_lead: Ready to clear? All learnings in?

risks_fired.evidence: All learnings in? — Claude defaults to affirmation rather than enumeration; same-session self-audit under-flags uncaptured branches; no adjacent body callout neutralises this (blockquote after covers accept-loss decision, not uncaptured-content enumeration)
risks_fired.fix_hint: Add an enumeration hook: 'List what landed in the skill or rules-file versus what is still only in scrollback' — forces enumeration over confirmation. Low-stakes since load_bearing is false.
